body_txt: A gathering of female characters, particularly teens or pre-teens. Often to talk about boys or make-overs. A staple of the simpler days of the Dom Com . Also popular in slasher horror as a convenient way to get a lot of attractive young women under one roof to terrorise them. More often called a pyjama party in the UK (and, by adoption, usually in Japan as well), seeing as that's the general clothing worn at such an event. And anyway, who sleeps at one of these things? Wacky Fratboy Hijinx will often involve trying to gatecrash (or at the very least, watch). Boys occasionally throw them as well, and they're full of tropes for teen/tween boys. For younger children, they can even be mixed-gender gatherings. Boys just call them "sleepovers" (or even better, just "spending the night") instead of Slumber Party or Pajama Party, though — they usually consider these terms too associated with girls. Watch out for Sleep Squashing , Blanket Tug O' War , Childish Pillow Fight , Snoring Beauty , Sleep talkers , Sleepwalkers and, if you're the only guy caught, Makeover Torment . Awkward First Sleepover is a Sub-Trope . See also Slumber Party Ploy .
